creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: I agree with antoine@. As long as /stable/11 is supported only aarch64, armv7 and ports limited to FreeBSD 12+ may accidentally underlink libraries. Bustage from --no-allow-shlib-undefined default currently interferes with Clang 8 and LLVM openmp dogfooding which is supposed to facilitate MFC to /stable/11 before 11.3 freeze.
